description_long: This house features a rectangular brick structure with a gable roof covered in reddish-brown shingles. The front facade is dominated by two large, black-framed windows set symmetrically within the brick wall, providing ample natural light to the interior. The side view reveals a single, central entryway with a dark wooden door framed in gray stone, giving the entrance a sturdy and traditional appearance. The rear of the house is windowless, maintaining the same brick pattern as the other sides. The roof extends slightly beyond the walls, offering minimal overhang. The overall design is simple and functional, reminiscent of early 20th-century utilitarian residential buildings.
description: A rectangular brick house with a gable roof, two large front windows, and a central wooden entry door. The design is simple, with symmetrical features and a traditional brick exterior.
description_view_0: The front view shows two large, black-framed windows set symmetrically in a brick wall beneath a gable roof.
description_view_1: The side view displays the main entryway, a dark wooden door framed in gray stone, with the gable roof sloping above.
description_view_2: The rear view mirrors the front but lacks windows, showing only the brick wall and roof.
description_view_3: The opposite side view reveals a plain brick wall with no windows or doors, and the gable roof above.
attribute_entryway_design: Central wooden door framed in gray stone, no porch or decorative elements
